turn_info.content: I'm struggling to make it through the day. My daughter was hit by a car in September and the traumatic experience is weighing heavy on my brain.

results.term: Troubled would not be the word I would use, but it...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Troubled would not be the word I would use, but it wasn't a car accident. She was hit by a car in the street outside of my house.

results.term: She was coming home from school. She is only 5.

turn_info.content: I have a hard time getting out of bed in the morning.

results.term: I would say that I am anxious all the time. She su...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I would say that I am anxious all the time. She survived, but she had some serious injuries after. I feel like a part of me died that day, the part that thought I could protect her no matter what. I would say that I'm also feeling ashamed because it was out of my control.

results.term: Is that how you would feel?

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Is that how you would feel?

results.term: thank you for saying that. I quit my job to focus ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: thank you for saying that. I quit my job to focus on her healing, and i don't want to go back to work now.

results.term: She is healing well, she has a moderate TBI (traum...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: She is healing well, she has a moderate TBI (traumatic brain injury) so there is still so much uncertainty. It sucks to blame ourselves for things that happen to our kids.

results.term: No. And I'm completely dreading going back to work...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: No. And I'm completely dreading going back to work. I wish I could somehow get paid to exist so that I can just stay home with my daughter all day.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: YES. And if you can figure out how to make that happen I'll give you 10% of the salary lol.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I've been looking for a remote part time job that has pay equivalent to a full time job. Apparently, that's not a thing.

results.term: I don't have a family. Just my daughter, and my bo...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I don't have a family. Just my daughter, and my boyfriend who lives in Australia that can't come here due to Covid restrictions. She does see her Dad everyday, but the part time hours I would need would have to be flexible and no company is even really hiring part time at the moment from what I can tell.

turn_info.content: I have a psychiatrist and a therapist that I have been working with. Their solution is medication which I am extremely against.
